description: CompositionGreen T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print with team badge appliqued on the front, has twill tape detailing along the seams and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsLook good, stay comfortable in ease in this sporty Chelsea soccer team T-shirt from adidas. This tee is crafted from soft polycot to offer exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans, tracks or shorts and sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
